title: Station Types Visited
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM Docked WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT StationType AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM Docked WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY StationType ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {total} docking event(s) across all station types during the report period. Your station type mix is a travel demographic — lots of outpost docks suggest frontier and deep space work; Coriolis and Orbis dominance suggests core worlds trading; megaship docking flags rescue response or Thargoid incursion activity.
details.help: Docked StationType values include Coriolis, Orbis, Outpost, AsteroidBase, Megaship, FleetCarrier, etc. total drives the title.

tagLines: Station architecture type docking log compiled. Station category frequency noted in the travel record.
Outposts mean the frontier. Ocellus stations mean economy. Fleet carriers mean someone let you aboard.
The types of stations you dock at are a map of where you operate in the galaxy's hierarchy.
